description:
REQ-029 Phase 1: The local skill catalog infrastructure is fully built (search/install/update/publish/lockfile with semver resolution). The missing piece is HTTP connectivity to the MCP Registry REST API (registry.modelcontextprotocol.io/v0/servers).

Add an optional `url` field to `SkillRegistrySourceConfig` in ops_skill/model.rs. When a registry config has a URL set, `handle_search()` should fetch the remote catalog via reqwest, merge results with the local catalog, and return unified results.

Requires adding `reqwest` as a dependency — review against Rust-only dependency policy first.

Key files: crates/orchestrator-cli/src/services/operations/ops_skill.rs, ops_skill/model.rs
title: Add MCP Registry HTTP fetch to ao skill search
